faqs.question: How can I get into Shardabai Pawar Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Shardabai Pawar Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.Pharma Candidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.
D.Pharma Candidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply

faqs.question: Which courses are available at Shardabai Pawar Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research for students?
faqs.answer: Courses offered by Shardabai Pawar Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research are B.Pharma, D.Pharma. These courses are in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences.

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Shardabai Pawar Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Shardabai Pawar Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research is up to 60. Good thing to know is that Shardabai Pawar Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like PCI.

college_info.college_name: College of Veterinary Science- Korutla, P.V. Narsimha Rao Telangana Veterinary University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

faqs.question: Does College of Veterinary Science- Korutla, P.V. Narsimha Rao Telangana Veterinary University has good and experienced faculty?
faqs.answer: College of Veterinary Science- Korutla, P.V. Narsimha Rao Telangana Veterinary University has been rated 3 for faculty as per reviews by students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: College of Veterinary Science- Korutla, P.V. Narsimha Rao Telangana Veterinary University provides Full Time programs at the UG level. These courses are available in stream like Science, and have a fee structure of around INR 68,500. UG programs include BVSC.

review_content.Placements: Around 75 students get placed every year in our college. The highest salary package is 2 LPM, the average salary is Rs.50,000 per month, and the lowest salary is Rs.25,000 per month. Top companies are Himalaya, Vet India, Sneha Chicken, and other nutrition departments. All students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are not up to the mark. Library is good. Digital classrooms are available. There is a big ground, volleyball court, basketball court, indoor badminton, table tennis, etc. Our college has a good mess for students which is in-charged by the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc and A.H) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: In CVS Korutla, faculty members are well qualified and experts in their respective fields.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 50% of the students get a role of government veterinary medical officer in their respective states or around the country. Among the rest of the students, almost 30% of the students get a private job in dairy farms, poultry farms, etc., as a medical officer or nutritionist. The salary offered is in a range of Rs. 40,000 to 5 lacs per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is adorable. Our college building is new and attached to a veterinary clinic or hospital, which is provided with all the required equipment. Our college has a hostel facility, and the hostel fee is included in the course fees only. There are proper facilities for the mess, canteen and various sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc and A.H) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent, Fabulous, Nice.

review_content.Placements: Every year, our placement in-charge officer has helped us a lot by providing a lot of opportunities. Veterinary has a very wide scope in both the private and government sectors. The completion of the course gets a less amount of salary, but gradually it increases.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college and hostel have good infrastructure. The hostels are very nice and comfortable to stay in. They have a very nice mess here. The infrastructure of our college is quite good but not as much as you would expect because it is a government college, so the facilities are average.

individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college with great and talented faculty.

content.Placements: 1.00% of students were placed in my course. 2. Not a particular package. 3. Suguna chicken companies, etc. 100% of students got internships at my college and also secured placements in Hyderabad Rajendranagar and various government hospitals. Top roles include becoming good veterinary doctors.

individual_reviews.title: In CVS Korutla, faculty members are well qualified and experts in their respective fields.

individual_reviews.title: Excellent, Fabulous, Nice.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc and A.H) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with college staff and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement is average as competition is very high for government jobs, only 3 qualified last year in post graduation exam. Only Bachelor's in veterinary course is available in college. It has numerous roles, people can go in private sector. In poultry farms, pet cares and also in government sector.
content.Infrastructure: Library is very small with less books. No Wi-Fi in college campus. No air conditioner in class. Lack of lights. No proper ground for any sport. Canteen also doesn't have options for vegetarians. In mess sometimes food is wasted. And sometimes there's shortage of food. Again there's partiality with vegetarians as there number is less. Labs have good samples and specimens.

review_summary.college_name: Shadan College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: A good and decent college for students, so they can join and have a great journey.

content.Placements: The college was good and decent. Faculty members taught students nicely. Students who qualified EAMCET get free seats but for students who did not get free seats should have to pay Rs. 1,50,000 per year. Although college was good. Students can go for it as it is a good college.
content.Infrastructure: We had labs. Classrooms were big. We had proper water facilities for drinking. There was a canteen for lunch. There were sports and a small garden where students played. I liked this college. As I studied here, I would suggest this college to other students.

individual_reviews.title: Although the college is excellent, it is recommended that you work part-time to gain experience.

content.Placements: Students got placed in MNCs. In the pharmaceutical industry, where we work as medical representatives, our degrees was highly valued. The lowest salary package offered was 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The majority of the machines were extremely useful for handling experiments and may have effectively helped in the completion of lab experiments. The food was average, but the maintenance was good. We had a lot of problems in our first year, but college students helped us out.
content.Faculty: The semester exams were difficult to explain. Every semester, we would suffer a lot of problems, like how to summarize some topics that were very important subject-wise. We would put in a lot of effort at that time to raise our profile.

individual_reviews.title: It provides affordable placements, and good staff.

content.Placements: In our course, only 30 students are placed in every college. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary pacakge offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Natco and Glenmark. Around 80-90% of students get internships from our course, and it provides doctor of pharmacy.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities are available in our course and the hostel is very neat. Our course is very good. The facilities and infrastructure are very good. They also provide daily laboratories and the library is available all the time a week. Computer connection is also available.

individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, great ambience, and a lot of opportunities after passing out.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placements. The highest was 40 LPA and the lowest was 3 LPA. Companies like Apollo Hospital, Zoi Group of Hospital, etc., visited. There were very few internships. Students were placed as pharmacists, medical examiners, medical quality, pharmacovigilance, quality controlling, quality assurance, and auditing.
content.Infrastructure: There was Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, playground, auditorium, parking, etc. I didn’t go to the hostel, but it had a hostel in which my classmates used to reside, and sometimes they told me about the mess and all, that it was average. The library didn’t have books from big authors.

individual_reviews.title: There are no placements in this college.

content.Placements: In shadan college we have 100 to 120 students in b pharmacy course and we don't have placement. There is no chance of placements only. How can a person get a chance. Then why are we studying here. Waste of 4 precious years. As other colleges provides many placements we don't even have a chance here.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has 10 floors where everything is good including library. And talking about canteen it charges us according to items. Which is reasonable. But almost times the left doesn't work and we have to climb for 9 floors which is not good as we are women we suffer from some problems related to health .

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shri J. G. Co-operative Hospital Society's Ayurvedic Medical College, Ghataprabha offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc., B.A.M.S. and D.Pharma. Whereas, at PG level, Shri J. G. Co-operative Hospital Society's Ayurvedic Medical College, Ghataprabha offers courses such as M.Sc., MD and MS. Shri J. G. Co-operative Hospital Society's Ayurvedic Medical College, Ghataprabha fee structure for all the courses is around INR 2,72,250 to 3,40,875.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: College review by a student.

review_content.Placements: You get a year's internship in a college hospital. But you do not get paid for the internship. College does give you enough knowledge so that you can work at your preferred clinic. After graduation, there is a one-year college internship, and after that, you can work wherever you want.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a complete and suitable campus, which is required for the medical courses. The campus consists of a hospital with ayurvedic treatment as well as modern medicine. The college also provides a library, which consists of all the books required to study the medical course.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Some facilities are good and some are average. Admission is done through a 3 category fee structure.

review_content.Placements: Every batch strength is 100 students, and every year it gets filled. Practicing with a Plan B.A.M.S. degree can get a salary of around Rs. 30,000 per month, varying according to places. Many ayurvedic pharmacy companies hire those who pass, and some start their practice. Top roles are a teacher in a medical college, entrepreneurship in Ayurveda, practitioners, and pursuing an MD and Ph.D. to boost opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college building and the hostel building are newly built. The environment is very good with lots of greenery around. The campus is big enough. Classrooms are ventilated naturally. Floor-wise washrooms are available, and classrooms are spacious. Hostel rooms are clean, though some are spacious and some are cramped. The college has provided access to a library and an e-library. The college does not have a certain canteen but has its mess. The food quality is good. Around the college campuses, lots of other messes are available.

review_summary.college_name: Shri J. G. Co-operative Hospital Society's Ayurvedic Medical College, Ghataprabha Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: College review by a student.

content.Placements: You get a year's internship in a college hospital. But you do not get paid for the internship. College does give you enough knowledge so that you can work at your preferred clinic. After graduation, there is a one-year college internship, and after that, you can work wherever you want.
content.Infrastructure: We have a complete and suitable campus, which is required for the medical courses. The campus consists of a hospital with ayurvedic treatment as well as modern medicine. The college also provides a library, which consists of all the books required to study the medical course.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Some facilities are good and some are average. Admission is done through a 3 category fee structure.

content.Placements: Every batch strength is 100 students, and every year it gets filled. Practicing with a Plan B.A.M.S. degree can get a salary of around Rs. 30,000 per month, varying according to places. Many ayurvedic pharmacy companies hire those who pass, and some start their practice. Top roles are a teacher in a medical college, entrepreneurship in Ayurveda, practitioners, and pursuing an MD and Ph.D. to boost opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The college building and the hostel building are newly built. The environment is very good with lots of greenery around. The campus is big enough. Classrooms are ventilated naturally. Floor-wise washrooms are available, and classrooms are spacious. Hostel rooms are clean, though some are spacious and some are cramped. The college has provided access to a library and an e-library. The college does not have a certain canteen but has its mess. The food quality is good. Around the college campuses, lots of other messes are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College, Thrissur.

review_content.Placements: Education is almost free. About 175 students can take admission here. All of them will get jobs. It is a top college in Kerala. There will be no tension about going jobless. We should write the NEET exam and have a good score to get admission.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college and course offer good education facilities and infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi in hostel. Labs are neat and clean and help to practice a lot. Classrooms are good with proper facilities. the library is useful for studying; all students go to the library for reference.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with academics, campus life, and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Students got placements through counseling which is conducted by MCC. After 4 years of the MBBS course, every student has to do one year of internship in the hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. A new building has been built with all departments. There is a central library and reading room with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are spacious with great ventilation. Our canteen is not much spacious. We have an indoor stadium for basketball and badminton. The hostel facilities are average.

review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College, Thrissur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My medical education

content.Placements: In our batch, there are no placement opportunities. Instead, there is an internship. We get to do one year of internship in our hospital itself. During this period, we will be given a stipend of about twenty-five thousand. We will be posted in different departments such as medicine, orthopedics, pediatrics, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is a well-developed college with fine infrastructure. Our classes have centralized AC. We have many additional buildings such as a gym, central lab, indoor stadium, and many auditoriums, etc. I'm staying in a government hostel, and in my hostel room, there are four members. The hostel mess is of high quality.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Government Medical College, Thrissur.

content.Placements: We have a class strength of 175 students. The total fees are 26,630 rupees per year. This includes all the tuition fees, special fees, and van fees. Scholarships are available for various categories like OBC, SC, and ST. Also, after 4 years of the course, we have a 1-year internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. They provide a separate academic block, a well-filled library along with a study hall. Classrooms are air-conditioned and provided with smart class facilities. We have a government hostel here with 3 persons per room and a mess with a good menu and affordable rates.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Medical College, Thrissur.

content.Placements: Education is almost free. About 175 students can take admission here. All of them will get jobs. It is a top college in Kerala. There will be no tension about going jobless. We should write the NEET exam and have a good score to get admission.
content.Infrastructure: The college and course offer good education facilities and infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi in hostel. Labs are neat and clean and help to practice a lot. Classrooms are good with proper facilities. the library is useful for studying; all students go to the library for reference.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with academics, campus life, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Students got placements through counseling which is conducted by MCC. After 4 years of the MBBS course, every student has to do one year of internship in the hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. A new building has been built with all departments. There is a central library and reading room with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are spacious with great ventilation. Our canteen is not much spacious. We have an indoor stadium for basketball and badminton. The hostel facilities are average.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Journey and rise of a doctor.

content.Placements: I think that more than our direct senior two batches, we were very good at academics. Many of my friends and batchmates were the ones in top ranks of entrance exams. They created a high competition for other batchmates and succeeded in bringing everyone to a top level of academics.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel was maintained professionally. It has many blocks and two buildings for boys and many buildings for girls hostel. Each block has a 5g WIFI connection. Mess was good and clean. They cleaned and maintained it hygienically. And seniors were the mess secretaries. So they took care of it. The food and stuffs were great.

description: Government Medical College, Thrissur cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College, Thrissur NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Thrissur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 7547 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 8155 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

While for the last round, the closing rank was 784 wherein DM in Cardiology proved to be the most sought-after in the General AI category. Students can check the first and last round closing ranks from the table provided below.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 784 for DM in Cardiology. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 1692.

college_info.intro:
SNS College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences popular programmes are BPharma and DPharma. BPharma and DPharma students are placed in top companies such as Sun Pharma, Divi’s Labs, Cipla, Zydus Lifesciences, Dr Reddy’s Labs, Torrent Pharma, and others. The college provides international quality education to students. Overall, SNS College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences is one of the best colleges offering quality education to students.
After completing their education at SNS College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences, students can become pharmacists, drug inspectors, food inspectors, medical underwriters, or even open a drugstore, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by SNS College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences and their respective eligibility and SNSCPHS fee structure:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SNS College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences offers PG and UG courses to students. At the UG level, the college offers BPharma courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers DPharma programme to students. SNS College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences admission is both entrance and merit-based for programmes offered at UG levels. A few popular exams accepted by the college for admission are CBSE 12th and Tamil Nadu 12th, etc. However, for admission to BPharma and DPharma, etc. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the SNS College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences and their respective eligibility and SNSCPHS fee structure:

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is like a hub of education for students.

review_content.Placements: As we are the first batch of the college, we have not attended any placement. We had many seminar and webinar in which guest lecturers were from top MNCs and multinational organisations. Our teachers have given a lot of information about this field and opportunities in pharma industries. I am sure that our batch will have 100% placements in topmost companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am highly satisfied with management as they have provided top-quality and imported equipment and world-class machines for our lab purpose. We have 24x7 Wi-Fi in our college for the educational purpose. Our library has a lot of important books related to our field of both Indian and foreign authors. Classrooms in our college are spacious and have a projector for the enlightenment of our education. The hostel gives us a home-like feeling with the best food and provides a great place to stay and study. We have doctors and nurse inside the campus for 24x7 for our help. They also provide great coaching for all students.

review_summary.college_name: Alvas Ayurvedic Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: As the teaching facility is good, I do recommend this college.

content.Placements: For others, placements happen, but not for us. As I know, we don't get any stipend during the internship, and after that, there is no campus selection for us. No hospitals are coming here and selecting us as duty doctors, so I think there is no placement.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is not good because the sharing here is 4 members in one room, and students from other courses also sometimes live in our hostel. The food is just okay, not too good. But the hostel security is kind of good because, for girls' safety, they have taken complete care.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It makes the best way by joining to the best college in Karnataka.

content.Placements: In this college, students have well and organized training. The quality of teaching is good, that everyone in our class copped with training, and everyone gets placed in some top notch companies. Our curriculum is updated. I would suggest joining this college for the best experience of teaching and life.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good. It provides good facilities in our classroom, laboratories, libraries, sports centers, and hostel. It also has well versed Wi-Fi, and it maintained well. Cleanliness is the main purpose of this college.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Sports and games are given importance. The labs are clean and well-equipped.

content.Placements: The lowest salary is 6000. No recruitments for BAMS course. The internship is offered in Alvas hospital.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi in college and hostel. We have both digital and normal library. Good mess and canteen. Food is not so bad. No smart classes. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are given importance. The labs are clean and well-equipped.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful. Quality of teaching is good. The course is of 5 and a half year with an internship in the hospital. The teachers are knowledgeable with a Ph.D. degree and college offers guidelines to research on your interest.

overview_faqs.question: How costly is William Carey University BSc?
overview_faqs.answer: William Carey University is not that expensive compared to other BSc-offering colleges. The total tuition fee of William Carey University is INR 1.7 Lacs to INR 10.6 Lacs depending upon the type of specialisation chosen. This makes the fee for one semester approximately INR 29,000 to INR 1.7 Lacs depending on the course.Even for expensive courses, William Carey University offers the facility of paying the semester fee in two instalments. Therefore, the BSc fees for each semester are not too costly and candidates have the opportunity to pay the tuition fees in up to 12 instalments.

overview_faqs.question: Can William Carey University be considered a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: William Carey University is one of the eminnet univeristy and has a unique institution committed primarily to higher education where the academy integrates with the socio-economic and environmental realities to bring about a total transformation of people and their contexts. It is a UGC (University Grants Commission) recognised university and approved by PCI. The university is a member of the Association of Indian Universities. During, William Carey University placements the highest and average package is INR 15 LPA and INR 4 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: Does William Carey University take additional fee from international students for D.Pharma course?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, William Carey University takes additional fees from international students applying for DPharma at the institute. The university also takes additional fees from other students that do not come from North-east India.William Carey University charges an additional fee so that there is more participation of North-east students in the university and they can take benefit of the education and facilities provided by the institute.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee to get admission in D.Pharma at William Carey University?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee to get admission to DPharm at William Carey University is INR 100. Candidates can apply through both online and offline modes. If candidates want to complete their application process through postal service, they are required to pay an application fee of INR 200.Candidates will have to pay the application fees for as many courses as they want to apply for. If a candidate wants to change their course/subject after their admission is confirmed they can do that within 10 days of admission and submit a fee of INR 200.

review_summary.college_name: William Carey University Shillong Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Neutral satisfaction and good.

content.Placements: There are only 16 students in my batch. When I was a student of that university there were no hiring companies and internships also. We have to search by our own but there are some students from my seniors batch they get placements through the help of sir and HOD.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructures are not so good I can say because the classrooms are divided by wooden walls. But the university has three blocks i.e., three buildings and I think block 1 and block 3 are rented. But I am not really sure and there are no hostel provided by the university. But there are some private hostels near the university.

individual_reviews.title: Discipline is very important in this college.

content.Placements: A lot of companies visit to campus for placements and students are eligible to sit for it in their final or pre-final semester of the course. Companies like Akash byju, Chegg, havells, Zigram, Physics Wallah have visited the campus for placements for various post like research assistant, business analyst, project manager, and subject matter expert, etc. The highest package was around 15Lpa for the post of data scientist and average packages were more than 4lpa for the profiles like research assistant and subject matter expert. The placement ratio is not that bad as in my class 15-20 out of 55 got placed with decent salary packages. If you are really good with your subject knowledge and skilled enough, it is not that hard to get placed in it. As I have mentioned earlier I want to join FSSAI as a junior food analyst. FSSAI is my dream workplace and hopefully, I'm on my way to getting there probably soon.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides very good environment for students.

content.Placements: Many companies visited our campus for placements. Students were eligible to sit for placements in their final or pre-final semester. The recruiting companies were Akash, Byjus, Havells, Jigram, and Physics Wallah. These companies visited our campus to offer placement for various roles like research assistant, business analyst, project manager, subject matter expert, etc. The highest salary package offered for the role of data scientist was 15 LPA and the average salary package was more than 4 LPA for the roles of research assistant and subject matter expert. Placement ratio is good as 15 to 20 students out of 55 got placed with good salary packages. Students good at the subjects and have enough skills will easily get placements in companies. I want to join FSSAI as a junior food analyst. FSSAI is my dream workplace and I'm on my way to get there soon.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for students.

content.Placements: Placements were very good. Top recruiting companies were TCS, Amazon, Flipkart, and Mahindra. Almost 80% of students got placed in this course. The average salary package offered was 22 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college was better. Hostels were very good. All facilities were decent. The food served in the mess was very good. They provided food thrice a day.
content.Faculty: The course curriculum was relevant. Teachers were well-experienced and highly qualified. Few of them were Ph.D. scholars. The teaching quality was better. If we studied properly then we would score good marks.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good university with such an affordable fee. It helps you in all-round development.

content.Placements: As there are no placements in our college for B.Sc graduates, but our college provides you with internships and an opportunity for practical work and help you in all-around development. Our college also helps you to have exposure to practical knowledge during your graduation course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is really good, but only the hostel facility is not available. There are pretty good classrooms, labs and library with all the required equipment and books. Sports are played in our college. All other necessary facilities are available on our campus.

admission_overview.college_name: William Carey University Shillong Course Admissions 2025: Application, Fee, Eligibility & Dates

paragraphs: William Carey University admissionsare primarily merit-based. The university offers more than 20 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels.William Carey Universityoffers programmes in multiple streams such as Arts, Science, Social Work, etc. Interested candidates can apply for online or offline admissions.

William Carey University offers courses in full-time mode. Since the admissions are currently open, aspirants must apply online or offline for admissions. Below are the key highlights forWilliam Carey University admissions:

PG courses:INR 76,000 - INR 6.4 lakh

William Carey University Admission Prospectus 2025

WCU Shillong offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants must also fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria specified for their programmes. Below are Willim Carey University courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Know about otherWilliam Carey University Courses

William Carey University feesincludes components such as tuition fee, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc. Aspirants need to pay the fee annually or semester-wise. The one-time charges, such as library security deposit, institute security deposit, grade card, and more are one-time payable. Below is William Carey University fee for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
William Carey University admissions are currently open. Candidates can get admission in both online or offline mode. Below are the steps to get a seat in William Carey University:
Step 1: WCU Application Process 2025

Aspirants can register online on the official website of the university or collect the form from the campus. After registration, aspirants need to fill out the admission form and pay INR 100 for final submission of the application. Aspirants can also send the form with an application fee of INR 200 via postal services.
Step 2: Selection

Once registration is over, the university evaluates the applications of the candidates. WCU considers the merit of the aspirants in the qualifying exam for admission. The university intimate the selected applicants by email or telephone along with the admission reciept or token.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Selected applicants need to complete the admission process by making the payment of first semester fee either at the university office or via any of the online payment gateway. Applicants must complete the admission process within the 10 days after receiving the admission confirmation mail.

placement_data.title: William Carey University Shillong Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: William Carey University placement statistics are not out yet. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, the highest package offered in recent years was INR 15 LPA . Further, the average package stood at INR 4 LPA . Havells, Chegg, and many other renowned companies participated in William Carey University placements over the past few years.

faqs.question: Does William Carey University have good placements?
faqs.answer: William Carrey University is a private institution established in 1892 in Meghalaya, Shillong. This university in Shillong was established in 2005 by the Government of Meghalaya and named after William Carey, a renowned English Baptist missionary. It is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and accredited by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE). The placement of this college has done an excellent job in placing more that 50% of its students every year. Companies like Akash, Byju, Chegg, Havells, Zigram, Physics Wallah, TCS, Amazon, Flipkart, and Mahindra have visited the campus for placements for various posts like research assistant, business analyst, project manager, and subject matter expert. The highest package offered till date has been around 15 Lpa for the post of data scientist and average packages were more than 4 LPA for the profiles like research assistant and subject matter expert. So with WCU you will be in safe hands in terms of excelling and succeeding in your career. At WCU you will be able to work in your dream company.

faqs.question: How are BSc placements at William Carey University?
faqs.answer: The placement cell of William Carey University is fantastic. They train students and invite companies to recruit them. With that the college has achieved a marvelous placement track record over the past several years. Companies like Akash, Byju, Chegg, Havells, Zigram, Physics Wallah, TCS, Amazon, Flipkart, and Mahindra visit the campus for placements. These companies recruit students for various posts like research assistant, business analyst, project manager, and subject matter expert. The highest package offered till date has been around 15 Lpa for the post of data scientist and average packages were more than 4 LPA for the profiles like research assistant and subject matter expert. The institution also provides you with internships and an opportunity for practical work and help you in all-around development. Our college also helps you to have exposure to practical knowledge during your graduation course. You can rest assured knowing that your time in William Carey University will be worth every thing given the mission and vision the college has for all of its students.

faqs.question: Are government jobs offered to BA graduates from William Carey University?
faqs.answer: William Carey University BA graduates can apply for government jobs in their field or another field. For most government jobs, graduation from UGC-approved colleges and William Carey University has UGC approval along with AICTE & PCI. A graduation degree also makes candidates eligible for higher studies, which can help them secure government jobs in teaching, research, and manufacturing. Alumni from the institution have applied and been selected as IPS officers in the state and other parts of the country.

faqs.question: What companies come to William Carey University for placements?
faqs.answer: Top companies from around the world like Mercedes, Toyota, Hyundai, and many more come in for placements at William Carey University. According to IIRF Rankings, in 2023 companies like FSSAI, Chegg, and Havells were the top recruiters during placements. According to Shiksha student reviews, the highest package offered for placements in 2023 was INR 15 LPA and the average package of placements in the university was INR 4 LPA. Though, there is not much information regarding placements in the university before that to compare it with the average salary garnered during placements in the university.

review_summary.college_name: JDT Islam College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Right decision if you are looking for a nice pharmacy college.

content.Placements: The course is convincing for a job as a hospital pharmacist, community pharmacist, as well as a medical representative. More than 95 percent of students who have successfully completed their course are working with a starting package of 15k-30k, which will surely increase with experience. The college has alumni working in India's leading pharmaceutical companies such as Sun Pharma. The college placement cell has helped many to get placed in Alembic Pharmaceuticals. The college placement cell connects you with employers so that the job will find you.

individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are really supportive, really good campus and the surrounding.

content.Placements: Students want around 80% mark to get merit seats They provide Diploma in pharmacy (d-pharma), Bachelors in pharmacy B.Pharma masters in pharmacy (m-pharma) You get top companies according to your marks you scored faculty members really help us to score good marks and they made so much efforts .
content.Infrastructure: There are well maintained labs for each subjects they provide, and big cleaned classrooms with projector, and a really peaceful and calm library, in library they provide so many books and every edition of Indian pharmacopoeia to refer. Mess food is not that bad Medical facilities are available and a rest room Support athletes .

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied of college and faculties with student friendly facilities

content.Placements: Best percent of students from our batch got placed . Our course offers alot of departments to work as a bpharm graduate . Here , course offers with budget friendly packages . Top roles offered Iour course is pharmacist in medical laboratories , hospitals, medical clinics , medical shops , medicine production centres , proffessors etc.
content.Infrastructure: College and facilities available are completely great. A very friendly classrooms , labs and library available. College never offers hostel.. but hostels are available nearby college. Mess and canteen serves bigh quality food . Same time medical facilities and everything was 100% perfect .

faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health And Medical Sciences:

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: NEIGRIHMS is a good college for MBBS students, with a good study environment.

review_content.Placements: A total of 50 students join the college every year, out of which 9 are from AIQ, 20 from NE Open Quota, and the rest are subdivided amongst Nagaland, Mizoram, Arunachal Pradesh and Meghalaya. The cancer wing, new hostels, and other new buildings are currently under development. The total number of MBBS seats will increase in the upcoming years. The stipend offered for internships is Rs. 23,500 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a huge library with many books and Wi-Fi facilities. A computer lab is available in our college. The library is open from 9 am to 9 pm in summer and from 9 am to 7 pm in winter. Many routine and special studies are available in our biochemistry, pathology, and other departments to diagnose many cases, including RTPCR and CBNAAT for COVID-19 diagnosis. There are currently four lecture theaters, and it will be increased once the new buildings are ready. Our college conducts classes in clinical teaching rooms for every department.

content.Placements: Our college provides top placement. Most of the students are selected through the placement cell. The average package is about 2.5 lacs per year. content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good; they provide hygienic services for the mess and hostel area. Rents for hostel rooms are affordable and have all the required facilities. The process of registering for a hostel room is nice and easy for all. The labs are very clean and good.

individual_reviews.title: All faculty members are very supportive and helpful.

content.Placements: Almost 89% of the students got placed in various companies like Emcure Pharma, Cipla PVT, Ajanta Pharma, etc. The highest salary package offered in our college is 15 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 4 to 5 LPA in various companies. Top recruiting companies are Emcure Pharma, Glenmark Pharma, TCS, PV and Lupin, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are 5 Wi-Fi classrooms for lecture and 15 laboratories, which are well-equipped for practicals and 60 seats available in per year. The library is excellent with all books, and all pharma and medical journals are available in the library. Food quality in the hostel is very good, and they are maintaining the hygienic conditions in mess and college canteen.

review_summary.college_name: Nandha College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Harassment by principal and not satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: There is no campus interview in the college and our course is one of the best in India, but they are not providing us with proper guidance. Do not fall for a fake college like this. I just got out of this college and I am not getting any jobs because this college does not give me any skills.
content.Infrastructure: Lab equipment never works; everything is out of service. The chemicals are expired and can't be used in any experiments. Classrooms are not ventilated properly. Teachers and professors are not treating us like fools and the principal would beat us every time.

individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with its placements.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in our batch. Around 90% of students got placed in this course. Many top recruiting companies visit our college to hire students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There are many books in the library. Laboratory and classrooms are well-maintained. Wi-Fi is also available on campus. Hostel facilities are decent, and the warden is very strict.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful. The teaching quality is better. Our course curriculum is average to make students ready for the industry. Semester exams are difficult.

individual_reviews.title: Memorable one with this college and gained so many friends.

content.Placements: Students got 100% results in every subject and offers are provided by top most companies. Many got internships in a nearby government hospital and also gained knowledge in the hospital pharmacy industry. They also conduct a job fair. It is a good college to study and enjoy.
content.Infrastructure: A peaceful ambience with a beautiful atmosphere, with friendly facilities and a big canteen center, and a peaceful library section, with so many nature scenes inside our college. They have Wi-Fi connection too, a big auditorium, classrooms are good, and smart classes are available. All subjects have individual labs too, and a botanical garden is also located.

reviews_list.review_title: A deep drive into Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy .

review_content.Placements: 30% of students are placed in campus in B. Pharma. The highest package offered by company is 6.25 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 2.5 LPA in B. Pharma. Sun Pharma, Abbott, etc. are the top recruiters. 50% students got internship from B. Pharma. Quality assurance, quality checker, etc. are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: A moderate college with well-equipped Wi-Fi, labs for performing practicals, and classes has AC rooms; it has a library but not as many books as can be present there. The hostel is not very good; it is moderate and the mess is also not so good. The medical facilities are not as good as they can be, and no sports or games activities are held in the college.

reviews_list.review_title: Amazing. As there are only girls in college, it is secure and loaded with full fun.

review_content.Placements: Placements for the computers background and commerce background is good and many people will be placed. And we will be having different placement cells for different departments. During the placement, lectures guide us to crack the interview.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college is the first university for women In Telangana. The infrastructure of the college might be old in some classes but now there are replacing it with new ones and it's too good. Our college sports department provides NCC and NSS training too.

overview_faqs.answer: Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmacy is a well-known institution for D.Pharma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmacy has a rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. review_summary.college_name: Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: The college have very supportive faculties members, and proper infrastructure.

content.Placements: This college has great placement facilities. Most of the companies come here to interview students who are interested in taking a job in their final year. The college also prepares students for any interview. Many famous companies like Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Torrent come here to interview students.
content.Infrastructure: This college has amazing infrastructure. All classrooms and labs are clean and fully equipped. The college provides Wi-Fi connections, and hostel facilities with an amazing mess. Students can participate in a variety of sports activities and games.

individual_reviews.title: A deep drive into Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy .

content.Placements: 30% of students are placed in campus in B. Pharma. The highest package offered by company is 6.25 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 2.5 LPA in B. Pharma. Sun Pharma, Abbott, etc. are the top recruiters. 50% students got internship from B. Pharma. Quality assurance, quality checker, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: A moderate college with well-equipped Wi-Fi, labs for performing practicals, and classes has AC rooms; it has a library but not as many books as can be present there. The hostel is not very good; it is moderate and the mess is also not so good. The medical facilities are not as good as they can be, and no sports or games activities are held in the college.

individual_reviews.title: Amazing. As there are only girls in college, it is secure and loaded with full fun.

content.Placements: Placements for the computers background and commerce background is good and many people will be placed. And we will be having different placement cells for different departments. During the placement, lectures guide us to crack the interview.
content.Infrastructure: My college is the first university for women In Telangana. The infrastructure of the college might be old in some classes but now there are replacing it with new ones and it's too good. Our college sports department provides NCC and NSS training too.

individual_reviews.title: This college provides higher education, and has never been more accessible.

content.Placements: In this college, good placements opportunities. One of the best colleges in India so placements are very good with high packages. Over 60 students have one crore package this year, and a lot of students get placed in very good companies. Overall, the placements rate are also high.
content.Infrastructure: This college has all the necessary infrastructure. Laboratories are well-equipped and air-conditioned. The library has a vast range of books. The whole campus has Wi-Fi. The campus is generally clean and the food is hygienic. There are various facilities like a gym, playground, sports equipment, etc. Both air-conditioner and non-air-conditioner rooms with 1, 2, 3, 4, 6 beds are available.

admission_overview.description: Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy admission 2026 is offered mainly on an entrance basis.The institute offers Diploma, UG and PG courses in the field of Pharmacy. There are different programmes offered by this institute such as DPharma, BPharma and MPharma. The college accepts score of entrance exams such as JEECUP, CUET UG and CUET PG. Interested candidates can check the sections below to know about the admission process, eligibility and selection process for taking admission at Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy.

eligibility_selection.title: Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy admisison to most of the courses is through the CUET exam. The college also takes admission based on JEECUP. Aspirants must meet the minimum eligibility criteria of the applied course. Find below the eligibility and selection process of Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with at least 50% marks(45% for reserved category students) in Physics, Chemistry, Biology or Mathematics
BPharma from PCI and AICTE approved institute with a minimum of 60% marks for General/OBC and 45% for reserved category students

faqs.answer: The eligibility for taking admission in BPharma programme at Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy requires the candidates to pass Class 12 with at least 50% marks (45% for reserved category students) in Physics, Chemistry, Biology or Mathematics.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for taking admission in BPharma programme at Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: Candidates applying for MPharma programme at Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy should have completed BPharma degree from PCI and AICTE approved institute with a minimum of 60% marks for General/OBC and 45% for reserved category students.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for taking admission in MPharma programme at Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: No,  Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy generally admits BPharma graduates  from PCI and AICTE approved institute with a minimum of 60% marks for General/OBC and 45% for reserved category students for M.Tech programme. So BSc graduate cannot take admission in MPharma.
faqs.question: Can I take admission in MPharma programme at Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy if I am a BSc graduate?

admission_process.title: Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy admission2026 is entrance-based. The college accepts score of entrance exam such as JEECUP, CUET UG and CUET PG for Diploma, UG and PG courses respectively. Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy offers three courses in the field of pharmacy.

The duration of Diploma course is two-year and for UG courses, it is four years. For PG programmes, the duration is two years. Candidates can check below the detailed steps of admission process at Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy:
Application Process

A candidate has to fill the application form of college from the official website of college. They can submit it either online or offline. Candidate slso need to register for the respective entrance exam required for admission into UG, PG or Diploma programme. Candidates must fill the online application form, pay the fee, and save the form in PDF.
Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy Result/Counselling

The deemed-to-be university releases results as per the schedule and based on the merit obtained in the entrance exam and subject to meeting the minimum eligibility conditions. After the results, allocates seats in different programmes after JEECUP and CUET counselling.
Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy Final Admission
The candidate will be provisionally admitted to the programme after paying the course-wise tuition fees. This helps the student to secure a seat in their prefferd course.

Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy total tuition fee vary depending on the programme. It is composed of different components. The institute also offers multiple seats for its courses. The payment has to be completed through the accepted payment gateway. Candidates can check below the total tuition fee and seats available at Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Pharmacy:

overview_faqs.question: How is the scope of microbiology?
overview_faqs.answer: The scope of microbiology is huge because of the involvement of microbiology in various fields such as Pharmacy, Medicine, clinical research, agriculture, dairy industry, water industry, nanotechnology & chemical technology. A person who specialises in this field is called a Microbiologist. Some of the Jobs in this field are mentioned below -1. Biomedical scientist2. Bio technologist3. Clinical research associate4. Food technologist5. Healthcare scientist, immunology6. Medicinal chemist7. Microbiologist8. Nano technologist.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in B.Pharma at SOP Sharda University?
Is SOP Sharda University good for D.Pharma?

faqs.answer: A:    SOP Sharda University offers good placements. As per recent records, the placement at the School of Pharmacy, Sharda University:The highest salary package offered at the School of Pharmacy, Sharda University, was INR 7 LPA.The average salary package offered was INR 4 LPA.The lowest salary package offered was INR 2.5 LPA.In the overall Sharda University placements 2023, the highest package offered was INR 45 LPA.
faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at SOP Sharda University?

faqs.answer: A:    B.Pharma Placements:The highest salary package offered was INR 7 LPA.The average salary package offered was INR 4 LPA.The average package is around 1 to 3 LPA according to the some students.Companies which came to the college for placements are not very big or good. Very few companies come to the college for placements.D.Pharma Placements:However, the university has a dedicated placement cell that actively works to connect students with industry professionals and potential employers.
faqs.question: Which has better placement at SOP Sharda University, B.Pharma or D.Pharma?

faqs.answer: A:    School of Pharmacy (SOP), Sharda University:The highest salary package offered was INR 7 LPA.The average salary package offered was INR 4 LPA.Top recruiters include Patanjali, Cipla, Sun Pharma, and Himalaya.GD Goenka University:The highest salary package offered was INR 17.5 LPA.The average salary package offered was INR 7.5 LPA.Top recruiters include TCS, Amazon, Deloitte, Wipro, HCL, Infosys, Cognizant, Capgemini, IBM, and Accenture.
faqs.question: Does SOP Sharda University offer better placements than GD Goenka University?

reviews_list.review_title: Not satisfied because of the fees structure.

review_content.Placements: Very few students got placed in our college. I don't have any idea about the packages offered, but according to the information I got, the average package is around 1 to 3 LPA. Companies which came to the college for placements are not very big or good. Very few companies come to the college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. All the courses have very good here. All the labs and classrooms have AC, and Wi-Fi is available all over the university. Libraries are very well-maintained, and a majority of books are present here.

reviews_list.review_title: Teachers are knowledgeable, placements are decent.

review_content.Placements: If you are totally into it, then you are surely going to get it. Actually, they provide 100% placements but few of the students go for abroad study and for higher studies, so they don't even sit for placements. Otherwise, you will get a job with decent packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the campus as sharda Wi-Fi. Rooms of college have AC and are ventilated enough. Central library is one of the loved place in the campus for those who love calm places. The environment of library is study friendly. They have an indoor game courts too.

faqs.answer: Sharda School of Pharmacy is one of the fastest emerging institute at Sharda University.Basically Sharda School of Pharmacy offers two cousrses which are :Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma)Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharm)You should select course according to your need. Not based on which course is good there.Still if you examine which is best among these, B.Pharma will be better one at SOP from placement perspective.
faqs.question: Q: Which is the best course at SOP Sharda University?

faqs.answer: No, a 75 percentile CUET score is not going to give you direct admission to Sharda University’s School of Pharmacy’s B.Pharma program.CUET results are not currently used by Sharda University for pharmacy admissions .The primary means of admission to the B.Pharma programme at SOP Sharda University is through Class 12 grades or scores on qualifying entrance exams.The eligibility for B.Pharma requires passing 10+2 with a 50% cumulative grade in PCB, PCM, and PCMB subjects
faqs.question: Q: Can I get B.Pharma at SOP Sharda University with 75 percentile in CUET?

faqs.answer: minimum marks: 55% - 65% in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology/Mathematics from your 10+2 exams.Focus on meeting the basic eligibility criteria (50% minimum) and striving for strong marks overall.
faqs.question: Q: What are the minimum marks required for D.Pharma at SOP Sharda University 2023?

faqs.answer: While receiving a 60% in your class 12 Diploma ensures that you will be given consideration for admission to SOP Sharda University's B.Pharma program, calculating your precise odds is difficult and depends on a number of factors:Qualifications: SOP Sharda University does not make available the minimal score needed for admission to the B.Pharma program.Competition & Seat Availability: Your prospects will be impacted by the amount of applicants in your year who have equal or better marks.

overview_faqs.question: How is life at School of Pharmacy (SOP), Sharda University?
overview_faqs.answer: Life at the School of Pharmacy (SOP) at Sharda University is described as a blend of learning, and integration of enduring principles. As a part of the Sharda family, students have an opportunity to show potential through exposure to virtually every field of academics, and co-curricular activities. The faculty at SOP are described as helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The curriculum is relevant and designed to make students industry-ready. Overall, life at SOP, Sharda University provides a comprehensive environment for personal and professional growth.

review_summary.college_name: SOP Sharda University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied overall.

content.Placements: Pharma.D course is the best for someone in search of their career in pharmacovigilance, research, and clinical pharmacology. It opens doors to the hospital as well as pharmaceutical industries. Pharma.D course will also help you work on your research projects and study both human body and medicine.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel provides a safe and secure environment with the best quality food and living. Guards are available 24 hour at our services. It has 24 hour ambulance, and hospital is also available nearby. Our campus is supportive and calm at every point with great living for both boys and girls.

individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, vibrant campus life, good scholarships, but faculty members' quality varies.

content.Placements: Around 65-100% of students got placed in this college. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered varies from 2 LPA - 3 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Patanjali, Cipla, Sun Pharma, and Himalaya. Students also get internships in companies like Sun Pharma and Viola. Pharmacy assistant, medical representative, sales executive, researcher, pharmacist, and technician., are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Sharda University provides a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. It has well-equipped pharmaceutical and chemistry laboratories. Classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned with projectors. It also has a resourceful library with textbooks, journals, and online research materials for D.Pharma students. Hostels have furnished rooms, along with Wi-Fi facilities 24/7. Mess food is varied. Medical center, sports facilities, and gym are available.

admission_process.title: School of Pharmacy, Sharda University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sharda University admissions to its School of Pharmacy are done via SUSAT or JEE/CET/CLAT/LSAT/CAT/MAT/XAT/NATA/NEET/CUET scores. The admission process begins with applying for the entrance exam. Find below the completeSchool of Pharmacy, Sharda University admission process2025:
Step 1: SOP Sharda University Application Process 2025

For SOP, Sharda University course admissions, the first step is to fill out an online application form. Aspirants who apply via SUAT are required to visit the official website of Sharda University to apply for the course and book a slot for the SUAT exam. They also have to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 for male and INR 1,000 for female candidates.
Step 2: SOP Selection Rounds

Candidates can either get admission via the SUAT or CUET UG exams. Aspirants are required to qualify for any of the respective exams with a valid score. Further, they also have to appear for a PI round conducted by the School of Pharmacy, Sharda University.
Step 3: SOP Counselling Process

The university will shortlist candidates based on their past academic records, entrance exam scores & PI round performance. The university will release the list of selected candidates and a provisional admission will be offered to those candidates.
Step 4: Fee Submission & Documents Verification

The selected candidates will be required to pay the course fee via Cash/ DD/ Credit-Debit Card or through Online payment. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSOP Sharda University feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

placement_data.title: SOP Sharda University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: School of Pharmacy (SOP), Sharda University has not released its placement report for the batch passing out in 2023. It will be updated here as and when released by the university. However, some of the top recruiters who participated during the recent year's placement process are available on the official website. Popular recruiters who participated in School of Pharmacy placements include Batra Hospital, AcuLife, SupplyCopia, Homoeoamigo, etc.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at SOP Sharda University?
faqs.answer: The highest package of 1 crore was offered at SOP Sharda University. The university apart from this offers a median package of 3.2 Lacs. Recruitment is done from some of the best medical institutions and hospitals all over the country. Sharda University has a well-established placement process for its students. The university claims to have placed over 65% to 100% of students in various companies since 1996. The placement process is transparent and commences with the uploading of students' profiles on the placement portal. The leading companies from all sectors are invited by the Placement Department on the campus, where eligible students are facilitated to go. The School of Pharmacy (SOP) at Sharda University has a 100% placement record, with the lowest package of 4 LPA and the highest package of 8 LPA. Sharda University follows a strict placement policy to ensure that each deserving candidate gets an opportunity for on-campus placement. The university has a list of top recruiters, including Amazon India, BYJU's, Wipro HR Services, and TCS, among others

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of SOP Sharda University?
faqs.answer: Top recruiters at the School of Pharmacy, Sharda University: Patanjali: Patanjali Ayurved Limited is an Indian consumer goods company, manufacturing units, and headquarters are located in the industrial area of Haridwar, while the registered office is located at Delhi. Cipla: Cipla primarily develops medicines to treat respiratory, and cardiovascular disease. Sun Pharma: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited is an Indian multinational pharmaceutical company headquartered in Mumbai, Maharashtra. Himalaya: It produces health care products under the name Himalaya Herbal Healthcare whose products include ayurvedic ingredients. In addition to these, some students also got internships in Sun Pharma and Viola. Other popular recruiters who participated in School of Pharmacy placements include Batra Hospital, AcuLife, SupplyCopia, and Homoeoamigo.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in B.Pharma at SOP Sharda University?
faqs.answer: There are no branches offered under B.Pharma at SOP, Sharda University. Courses offered by School of Pharmacy (SOP) Sharda University is Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm) which cost around 90000 per semester, D.Pharm which cost around 60000 per semester and Ph.D in Pharmacy which cost around 40000 per semester. For Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm) the core pharmacy subjects include Pharmaceutics, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Pharmacognosy and Pharmacology. The admission criteria for B.Pharm is minimum 50% marks in 10+2 in PCB.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Pinnamaneni Siddhartha Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Foundation Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: A wonderful college where dreams come true.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in this course is high. The highest package is around 12-14 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 5 to 8 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Manipal Hospital, Narayana Hospital, Apollo Hospital, etc. The internship rate is also high.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very spacious, with sophisticated Wi-Fi facility. Labs are equipped with modern equipment, and the library is vast, with all the books available. There are 24/7 medical facilities, and the food is hygienic and consists of different varieties.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure and facilities with good placements and supportive faculty members.

content.Placements: It is one of the most reputed medical colleges in Andhra Pradesh. The placement rate is high with graduates securing top roles in various hospitals, research fields and pharmaceutical companies. Internships are part of the curriculum typically done at the college affiliated hospital. Top roles include medical officer, president doctor and the specials doctor.
content.Infrastructure: College provides good and optimistic Wi-Fi facilities and well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and a vast library. Hostels are comfortable with food, medical care, and sports facilities. We have different types of rooms with options of single room, double or triple occupancy.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college I have ever seen.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students were placed in MD, MS, and other branches. The average salary pacakge offered ranges from 12 LPA to 4 LPA with respect from the public as students are doctors. NEET PG and many other hospitals like KIMS and even government hospitals also 100%, and same hospital and other hospitals also as MD, MS duty doctors.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was provided, but it won't give satisfaction. The speed was not good, but students can keep their Wi-Fi, which gives such freedom. Laboratories were good with good infrastructure and good technicians. Classrooms provide centrally air-conditioned, and the quality of food in mess was good, students can order from outside also. Students had hospitals so they need not worry about medical facilities. Sports provides cricket, volleyball, basketball, football, separate grounds with PET.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Settled for an All Rounder MBBS College.

content.Placements: There are 150 students who are selected from NEET UG exam for each batch each year. MBBS is a course after which almost everyone can get a job through different central and state conducting exams or in private hospitals as well through personal interviews. Every student has to do internship for one whole year after the completion of the course in the same college. It is a paid internship.
content.Infrastructure: With huge galleries for lectures and digital teaching, the college is well built with technically advanced labs, a central Library with all sorts of books and journals from Indian to foreign authors, clean and hygienic lavatories for men and women, has an impeccable teaching quality and conducts exams on regular basis. The hospital with almost 900 beds for the patients and a 24/7 emergency ward, also has a different building for super speciality departments. Basketball coaching and yoga classes after class timings are just like cherry on top of cake for the students here to keep themselves fit and fine. Apart from the hostel mess, the college also provides the students and faculty members with a central canteen.
